ValidationRule.description: Project Currency can not be changed after Child exist(ed)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
ISCHANGED( ProjectCurrency__c ), OR( ValCountHasPackageCheckbox__c=true, ValHasTime__c=true, ValHasExpense__c=true, ValHasSupplierCosts__c=true, ValCountHasInvoiceCheckbox__c=true ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Project Curency can not be changed anymore due to existing child objects (time, expense, supplier costs, Invoices). Please contact your Super User for assistance. (PR006)
